summary.problem: The changelog item mentions a broad capability, but the implementation path is unclear and spans multiple systems.
summary.proposed_capability: Investigate whether the feature could reduce orchestration complexity later in the roadmap.
summary.why_now: We want early awareness without forcing work into the active queue.
assumptions: No immediate product milestone depends on this feature.

acceptance_criteria.description: Document the capability and track it for later review.

open_questions.question: Would this require cross-repo orchestration support?
open_questions.resolution_notes: Likely yes, which keeps it out of the MVP lane for now.

factors.name: external_api_contract_change
factors.notes: The feature would likely touch multiple contracts if adopted.

factors.name: model_behavior_change
factors.notes: It would alter orchestration behavior if we decide to pursue it.

relevance.rationale: The feature is interesting but too broad for the current MVP execution lane.
